name: example-clone-resend
title: Clone Resend
description: Clone Resend's site — clean developer-tool landing with gradient hero.

description_i18n.en: Clone Resend's site — clean developer-tool landing with gradient hero.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 复刻 Resend 官网 —— 干净的开发者工具落地页，渐变 hero。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 復刻 Resend 官網 —— 乾淨的開發者工具落地頁，漸層 hero。

query.en: Clone this website faithfully: https://resend.com. Use the web-clone workflow — recon the site, harvest its real fonts and images, match its exact colors and scroll feel, then build a local clone. Keep the original assets; record trademarks/copyright in NOTES.md for me to replace.
query.zh-CN: 忠实复刻这个网站：https://resend.com。走 web-clone 流程 —— 侦察站点、抓取真实字体与图片、照抄精确色值与滚动体感，再构建本地复刻。保留原始素材；把商标/版权项记进 NOTES.md 交我替换。
